rule_metadata.name: Mal_Infostealer_Win32_Jupyter_InfoStealer_Module
rule_metadata.author: BlackBerry Threat Research Team
rule_metadata.license: This Yara rule is provided under the Apache License 2.0 (https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0) and open to any user or organization, as long as you use it under this license and ensure originator credit in any derivative to The BlackBerry Research & Intelligence Team

rules.rule_text:
import "pe"

rule Mal_Infostealer_Win32_Jupyter_InfoStealer_Module
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects Jupter infostealer module"
		reference = "https://blogs.blackberry.com/en/2022/01/threat-thursday-jupyter-infostealer-is-a-master-of-disguise"
		author = "BlackBerry Threat Research Team"
		date = "2021-11-08"
		license = "This Yara rule is provided under the Apache License 2.0 (https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0) and open to any user or organization, as long as you use it under this license and ensure originator credit in any derivative to The BlackBerry Research & Intelligence Team"

	strings:
		$d1 = "WebRequest" nocase
		$d2 = "HttpWebRequest" nocase
		$d3 = "WebResponse" nocase
		$d4 = "GetResponseStream" nocase
		$d5 = "GetResponse" nocase
		$d6 = "IsInRole" nocase
		$d7 = "get_UTF8" nocase
		$d8 = "FromBase64String" nocase
		$d9 = "get_OSVersion" nocase
		$d10 = "GetFiles" nocase
		$d11 = "GetExtension" nocase
		$d12 = "get_Current" nocase
		$d13 = "GetEnumerator" nocase
		$j1 = { 6C 6F 67 69 6E 73 }
		$j2 = { 43 00 6F 00 6F 00 6B 00 69 00 65 00 73 }
		$j3 = { 00 6C 00 6F 00 67 00 69 00 6E 00 73 00 2E 00 6A 00 73 00 6F 00 6E 00 }
		$j4 = { 00 63 00 6F 00 6F 00 6B 00 69 00 65 00 73 00 2E 00 73 00 71 00 6C 00 69 00 74 00 65 00 }

	condition:
		pe.imports( "mscoree.dll" , "_CorDllMain" ) and 12 of ( $d* ) and 2 of ( $j* )
}
